text:
LONG NAME: DRG_PRICE_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the following amounts: 

MEDPAR Medicare payment amount, MEDPAR beneficiary primary payer payment amount, MEDPAR 
beneficiary coinsurance liability amount, MEDPAR beneficiary Inpatient deductible liability amount, 
MEDPAR beneficiary blood deductible amount; and then subtracting from the sum the MEDPAR DRG 
outlier approved payment amount. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
